summary.lv: Epson Europe BV (Seiko Epson Corporation Eiropas filiāle) meklē Web un E-Learning sistēmu administratoru Rīgas birojam, kas uzturēs un attīstīs uzņēmuma tīmekļa un e-mācību platformas hibrīda režīmā.
summary.en: Epson Europe BV — the European arm of Seiko Epson Corporation — is hiring a Web & E-Learning System Administrator in Riga to maintain and develop the company's web and e-learning platforms in a hybrid setup.
